title: Mass email using "mirrored email column"
excerpt:
Description
Some of our clients send mass emails from boards other than the main Contacts board. On those boards, the email address is not stored in a dedicated email column, but instead is pulled in via a mirror column …

posts.author: ofuks001 (Omara Fuks)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Some of our clients send mass emails from boards other than the main Contacts board. On those boards, the email address is not stored in a dedicated email column, but instead is pulled in via a mirror column from the Contacts board.

We would like the ability to send mass emails using email addresses stored in mirror columns, so users can run campaigns from other boards while still leveraging their primary contact data.

What are you trying to achieve

We would like the ability to send mass emails using email addresses stored in mirror columns, so users can run campaigns from other boards while still leveraging their primary contact data.

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ofuks001 ,

Instead of using a mirror column, you could use a regular column with our app Mirror Item Multiple Boards.

What You Can Do with Mirror Item -

Add the SAME ITEM ON MULTIPLE BOARDS with live sync and full context

Sync UPDATES + REPLIES in real time for items and subitems

Set up automations like “When status changes to something, mirror item to target board and group”

Create a Master Board with items/subitems from multiple boards

Add a subitem from one board as a main item on another board

Keep your boards clean and connected with Regular Columns — no Mirror Columns or Connect Boards needed

Once you use it, you could use the regular email column to send emails.

Feel free to reach out to us at support@fortimus.co if you need assistance with setup.

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
@ofuks001@ofuks001,

If you are open to use marketplace apps, you can send mass emails to mirrored columns columns using SuperMail.

auth.monday.com

SuperMail – Email Automation - monday.com Marketplace

Emails designed, sent, and tracked inside monday.com

posts.author: Mariia (Mariia Mykhasiuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @ofuks001 ! You’re right that monday’s native mass email automations only work with email values stored directly in an Email column. Mirror columns aren’t recognized, even if the mirrored data comes from a validated Contacts board. At the moment, there is no built-in workaround for sending campaigns from other boards while reusing mirrored contact data.

If you need this ability today, one option is Email to Tasks for monday.com. It lets you pull email addresses from any column type, including mirror columns, and send emails to multiple recipients without relying on Monday’s native restrictions. This makes it possible to run email workflows or campaigns directly from secondary boards while still using your centralized contact database.
